mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.is_active AS isActive, s.store_id AS storeId FROM uid d JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN store s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.provider = #{provider} AND d.provider_uid = #{providerUid} LIMIT 1
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, s.store_id AS storeId FROM user u LEFT JOIN store s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( user_name, pass_hash, user_mail, user_phone, is_active, email_verified ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{passHash}, #{userMail}, #{userPhone}, #{isActive}, #{emailVerified} )
INSERT INTO uid (user_id, provider, provider_uid, pass_hash) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUid}, NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, pass_hash as passHash, user_name as userName, user_mail as userMail, user_phone as userPhone, is_active as isActive FROM user WHERE user_mail = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT user_id as userId, pass_hash as passHash, user_name as userName, user_mail as userMail, user_phone as userPhone, is_active as isActive FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
